name: EZPAWN
description_short: Las Vegas, NV's EZPAWN at 4155 S Jones Blvd offers quick pawn loans, jewelry purchases, and product redemptions seven days a week.
description_long:
Located at 4155 S Jones Blvd Suite B in Las Vegas, NV, this EZPAWN location serves the south strip area with convenient pawn and resale services. The standalone storefront is easy to access and operates six days a week during standard hours, with extended Sunday availability from noon to 5 PM.

At this Las Vegas location, you can bring jewelry, electronics, tools, and other items for immediate cash pawn loans, or browse inventory of pre-owned goods and brand-name merchandise. Call 702-702-7296 to ask about rates, redemption status, or to get a quick quote before visiting.

If you need quick cash in Las Vegas, NV, bring a valid ID and your item—EZPAWN offers same-day transactions with no credit check required. This location is ideal for residents and visitors in the south Las Vegas area who need immediate liquidity without waiting for traditional lending.
address: 4155 S Jones Blvd Ste B, Las Vegas, NV 89103

company_info.headquarters: 4155 S Jones Blvd Ste B, Las Vegas, NV 89103

pros: EZ+ Rewards Program lets customers manage pawns, layaways, and payments online without visiting the store
Instant Quote tool provides estimated electronics values online before customers make the trip
Layaway available year-round with only 10% down and monthly payments
Firearms loans and purchases offered on-site with secure on-premises storage
Pre-owned merchandise priced 25–70% below new retail with daily new inventory arrivals
Gold and diamond jewelry buying with in-house expert appraisers
Auto loans listed as a specialty service at this location
cons: Pawn loan APRs, interest rates, and fee structures are not disclosed on the website
Take Today financing requires third-party credit approval — may be unavailable to unbanked or low-credit customers
Online payment functionality is not available in Arizona, Oregon, or Pennsylvania (national limitation noted in-store)
Firearms redemption requires a background check, adding a step that may delay retrieval
No indication of loan amounts or loan-to-value ratios, making it impossible to compare costs before visiting
best_for: People who own electronics, jewelry, tools, or firearms and need cash within hours
Bargain hunters seeking brand-name pre-owned goods at deep discounts
Customers who want to sell gold or diamond jewelry for immediate cash
Shoppers who need layaway to spread out purchases without a credit check
diagnosis: EZPAWN is best suited for consumers who have tangible assets to collateralize and need cash the same day, or who want heavily discounted pre-owned goods without a credit check. The main caveat is full cost opacity — loan fees and APRs are never disclosed online, so borrowers cannot meaningfully compare this against other emergency cash options before walking in.
services: Online shop with daily inventory updates
EZ+ Rewards Program (online pawn and layaway management)
Take Today third-party financing (up to 12 months)
Product Protection Plans for electronics and audio/video
Jewelry VIP Program (guaranteed loan amounts, free cleaning, stone replacement)
meta_description: EZPAWN at 4155 S Jones Blvd, Las Vegas, NV. Quick cash loans and pre-owned merchandise seven days a week.
